name: Benzoyl Peroxide
description: Benzoyl peroxide is a powerful antimicrobial treatment that kills the P. acnes bacteria responsible for inflammatory acne. It works by introducing oxygen into pores, creating an environment where bacteria cannot survive. Available in concentrations from 2.5% to 10%, lower strengths are often just as effective with less irritation.

relatedProducts.name: COSRX Low pH Good Morning Gel Cleanser
